---
title: "Human Mobility Patterns in Climate-Stressed Regions: Evidence from Afar and Somali"
author: "Yonatan D. Enaro"
date: "2025-03-22"
categories: [Climate Economics, KoboToolbox]
---

Exploring how environmental shocks drive household migration decisions through mixed-methods research combining household surveys and key informant interviews in Ethiopia's Afar and Somali regions.
